notes: Discounts shown are representative's net cost
For larger quantity orders / special quotations - Consult Factory
Freight terms are per standard representative multiplier sheet

freight.ffa_note: Full Freight Allowed + applicable zone surcharge on shipments 2,000 lbs or more
freight.no_ffa_note: No freight allowance on shipments under 2,000 lbs — buyer arranges freight

tagging_adder.description: Add 12% of total list price for factory tagging of individual cartons with room numbers, floor, building, etc.

other_charges.order_change_fee_description: Any changes to a released order — $25.00 net charge per change
other_charges.cancellation_description: Minimum 10% and maximum of all time and material, depending on work completed
other_charges.minimum_order_description: Orders with an invoice of less than $25.00 will be invoiced at $25.00
